Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 702}These posters and paintings are far from meaningless for us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 702}With our acts, we will change the flow of causality...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 702}The concept of salvation will be in greater harmony with the earth, tipping the scales to deliverance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 702}The earth, seeking salvation, will become an empty vessel for Nyx-sama to fill.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 702}Soon, Mother Nyx will descend from the heavens, bringing the great Deliverance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 702}It will be the single greatest act of salvation that mankind has ever witnessed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 702}We humans, trapped in our earthly forms, will be embraced in Nyx's arms...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 702}We will sleep soundlessly and forever dream a dream of all beings melted into one form...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 702}This form will shatter to pieces in Nyx's crucible, bringing about our salvation.[n]{f 1 1}
